summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Legal Risk Matrix webapp. All core functionality working correctly including document upload, AI analysis with Gemini 2.5 Flash, risk matrix generation, Excel download, and navigation between pages.
passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working correctly (100% success rate)
Document upload with validation (PDF, Word, Excel)
AI analysis using Gemini 2.5 Flash integration
Risk matrix generation with proper categorization
Excel file generation and download (7.5KB file)
History page with analysis cards display
Analysis results page with risk matrix table
Navigation between all pages working correctly
Swiss Brutalist design implementation with Cabinet Grotesk font
Process status indicators and disabled states
Error handling for invalid file types (400 status)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor file input visibility issue)
